summary: Backend refactoring testing complete. server.py reduced from 7391 to 629 lines. All 15 backend API tests pass. Frontend main page and counselor app both working correctly. Scrolling on counselor attendance app verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - server.py reduced from 7391 to 629 lines
12 router files created under /app/backend/routers/ for modular organization
Services extracted to /app/backend/services/ (database.py, geocoding.py, helpers.py, bus_utils.py)
All API endpoints verified working via pytest (15/15 tests pass)
Counselor app scrolling fixed with WebkitOverflowScrolling and overscrollBehavior CSS properties
App.css updated to remove overflow: hidden that was blocking scroll
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing data (530 campers, 34 buses).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major backend refactoring completed successfully. server.py went from 7391 lines to 629 lines. All routes extracted into 12 router files under /app/backend/routers/. Frontend counselor app scrolling is now working - all 15 campers visible by scrolling. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_refactored_api.py covers all major endpoints.

features_tested.backend_seasons_active: PASS - GET /api/seasons/active returns active season with 530 campers
features_tested.backend_campers: PASS - GET /api/campers returns list of campers
features_tested.backend_bus_tracking_login: PASS - POST /api/bus-tracking/login with pin '1' returns Bus #01 with 15 campers
features_tested.backend_route_sheet: PASS - GET /api/route-sheet/Bus%20%2301 returns 12 AM stops, 14 PM stops
features_tested.frontend_main_page: PASS - Main page loads with map showing 528 campers and sidebar
features_tested.frontend_counselor_login: PASS - Counselor login screen loads with Bus Tracker title
features_tested.frontend_counselor_attendance: PASS - After login, shows Bus #01 with 15 campers and attendance buttons
features_tested.frontend_counselor_scrolling: PASS - Page scrolls correctly, all 15 campers visible by scrolling (page height 1400px, viewport 844px)
features_tested.frontend_attendance_marking: PASS - Marking present/absent updates stats correctly

notes.refactoring_summary: server.py reduced from 7391 to 629 lines. Routes extracted to: config.py, seasons.py, campers.py, tracking.py, shadows.py, zones.py, buses.py, audit.py, staff.py, sheets.py, roster.py, sync.py
notes.scrolling_fix: CounselorApp.jsx updated with WebkitOverflowScrolling: 'touch', overscrollBehavior: 'contain', and position: 'static'. App.css overflow: hidden removed.
